mapper.insert: INSERT INTO report_comment (report_id, question_text, user_answer, score, comment, sort_order) VALUES (#{reportId}, #{questionText}, #{userAnswer}, #{score}, #{comment}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.select: SELECT id, report_id, question_text, user_answer, score, comment, sort_order FROM report_comment WHERE report_id = #{reportId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC
